para_trans: The requests of the officers of the cadre were changed.
Department of Revenue and Forest, Ministry,
Government Order No: एमएफएस-08.25/प R. No.108 / Forest-8.
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Regulation of transfers of government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
Powered by the provisions of sections 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005
Requests by the Superintendent of Office, Group-B (Gazetted) cadre officers with the approval of the authorities.
The changes are being made as follows: -
table_trans: Mr. Sachin Arshi Office of the Superintendent Group-B (Gazetted), Alibag Forest Department, Alibag
Mr. Sachin Bhaiyyaji Kanhe, Office Superintendent, Room-21, Office of the Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Chief of Forest Force) Maharashtra State, Nagpur
Mr. Baban Madhukar Patil, Office of the Superintendent, Office of the Conservator of Forests, Social Forestry, Pune

para_trans: 2. The officer who has been given the said appointment / posting shall be reappointed by the Controlling Officer.
Remove immediately to be on the spot. Also, a new appointment to the officer concerned.
On what date was he relieved of his duties to appear on the spot and who replaced him in the new appointment?
The date of appearance should be intimated to the government by the concerned Controller Officers.
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: Shri Prakash Chintaman Chauray, Office of the Superintendent and Regional Director, Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve, Chandrapur
Mr. Ananda Paliwal, Office Superintendent - Room 10 (A) P.M.V.S (Office of the Chief of Forest Force)
